meeting_title: Field Span Transport / Voxel:  Pick up discussions and confirm next steps

safety_use_cases.label: Trailer pull-away detection at docks
safety_use_cases.description: Detect and alert on trailer pull-aways during loading/unloading to prevent serious dock safety incidents while also impacting operations.

evidence.quote: You know, one thing that I was thinking about, too, and this is probably a little bit more safety than operations, but like, you know, trailer pull-aways as well.
evidence.speaker: Riley Winslow <fake.riley.winslow@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: You know, that's a more complex computer vision problem, certainly has a safety and an operational component to it as well.
evidence.speaker: Riley Winslow <fake.riley.winslow@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Behavior-based safety analytics with heat maps (pilot)
safety_use_cases.description: Run a behavior-based safety program using computer vision and heat maps at a pilot facility to demonstrate ROI and safety metric improvements before broader rollout.

evidence.quote: A branded behavior-based solution that Riley was highlighted, get some heat maps going, really get you comfortable with it, and then from there, we take it out.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Sawyer <fake.hollis.sawyer@voxelai.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Trailer pull-away detection at docks
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Monitor and detect trailer pull-aways to reduce operational disruptions and losses in addition to safety risk mitigation.

evidence.quote: You know, one thing that I was thinking about, too, and this is probably a little bit more safety than operations, but like, you know, trailer pull-aways as well.
evidence.speaker: Riley Winslow <fake.riley.winslow@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: You know, that's a more complex computer vision problem, certainly has a safety and an operational component to it as well.
evidence.speaker: Riley Winslow <fake.riley.winslow@voxelai.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Product damage tracking
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Use computer vision to detect and track product damage events in the facility to reduce waste, rework, and associated costs.

evidence.quote: You know, when it comes to tracking product damage or exploring camera-based monitoring with other customers, one example is detecting when a product is out of spec or left where it should not be for too long.
evidence.speaker: Riley Winslow <fake.riley.winslow@voxelai.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Product condition and dwell-time detection
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Leverage camera-based monitoring to detect products that are out of spec or left in the wrong place for too long to prevent spoilage and reduce downstream issues.

evidence.quote: You know, when it comes to tracking product damage or exploring camera-based monitoring in this area, one example is detecting when a product is out of spec or left where it should not be for too long.
evidence.speaker: Riley Winslow <fake.riley.winslow@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: If you're finding something that's out of spec.
evidence.speaker: Max Conrad <fake.max.conrad@fieldspantransport.com>
